title: Golden Steamed Slovakian White Cabbage Dumplings
description: A traditional Slovakian dish featuring steamed dumplings filled with white cabbage and pork, perfect for a midnight craving. The smoky flavor comes from the addition of caraway seeds and smoked paprika.

ingredients.name: ground pork
ingredients.notes: preferably with some fat for juiciness

instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the ground pork, shredded cabbage, caraway seeds, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper, and mix well with your hands until just combined.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the flour, eggs, and milk to form a dough.
Gradually add the dough to the pork mixture, mixing until a sticky dough forms.
Knead the dough on a floured surface for about 5 minutes, until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Divide the dough into 8 equal pieces and shape each into a ball.
Flatten each ball into a disk shape and place a tablespoon of the pork and cabbage mixture in the center of each disk.
Fold the dough over the filling to form a half-moon shape and press the edges together to seal the dumpling.
Place the dumplings in a steamer basket, leaving some space between each dumpling to allow for even cooking.
Steam the dumplings over boiling water for 15 minutes, or until they are cooked through and fluffy.
Serve the dumplings hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley or dill if desired.
